top.title: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
top.summary: On Monday Iran said it had responded to the latest US proposal and that exchanges with Washington were continuing.

top.title: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
top.summary: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.

top.title: Israeli forces boarding Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
top.summary: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.

top.title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
top.summary: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.

top.title: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
top.summary: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
